title: brebissonia microphylla
intro: Brebissonia microphylla is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the dandelion or sunflower family. Brebissonia microphylla is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving liver function. Brebissonia microphylla is typically prepared as a tincture or tea, and can also be consumed as a raw herb or added to supplements for its medicinal properties.
